name: Salmon-And-Olives Tartar
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Black Greek olives (such as Calamata, pitted and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. PLACE THE SALMON IN THE FREEZER and freeze for 30 minutes to kill any parasites.
2. DEFROST the salmon in the refrigerator when ready to serve.
3. COMBINE the olives, oregano, shallots, parsley, lemon juice, and olive oil in a mixing bowl.
4. JUST BEFORE SERVING, finely chop the salmon by hand and add it to the olive mixture.
5. MOULD the tartar on a plate.
6. GARNISH with lemon wedges and toast.
